# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-04-03 | **更新时间**: 06:55 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[02:30]` **🏛️监管 | 科罗拉多大学安舒茨盖茨研究所取得美国第一FDA 批准校园内构建的 CAR T 细胞疗法**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *The University of Colorado Anschutz Gates Institute Achieves First-in-U.S. FDA Clearance for Campus-Built CAR T-Cell Therapy* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **🏛️监管 | Wugen 入选美国 FDA 化学、制造和控制开发和准备试点计划，以支持 Soficabtagene Geleucel 的生产准备**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Wugen Selected for U.S. FDA Chemistry, Manufacturing, and Controls Development and Readiness Pilot Program to Support Manufacturing Readiness of Soficabtagene Geleucel* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **Coya Therapeutics 宣布计划董事会换届并任命 Mark H. Pavao 为独立董事**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Coya Therapeutics Announces Planned Board Transition and Appointment of Mark H. Pavao as Independent Director* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5)</small>
- `[18:00]` **AvenCell Therapeutics 宣布 I 期 QUADvance 研究中第一位患者接受 AVC-203 治疗，AVC-203 是一种新型同种异体 CD19/CD20 双靶向 CAR-T 研究疗法，用于治疗复发/难治性 B 细胞恶性肿瘤**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *AvenCell Therapeutics Announces First Patient Dosed in Phase I QUADvance Study with AVC-203, a Novel Allogeneic CD19/CD20 Dual-Targeting CAR-T Investigational Therapy for the Treatment of Relapsed/Refractory B-Cell Malignancies* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>

---
